meaning: n.(旧指)燧发枪手,燧发枪手团
examples: Fusilier Flint-Broughton had joined the Army in November 2011 and was on his first overseas deployment.
Lt Col Lindsay said Fusilier Flint was a soldier "brimming with skill and ability".
However, he added that the only people who killed Fusilier Gentle were the terrorists who planted the bomb.
